questions.question: In the 1982 Eddie Murphy movie 48 Hours, what actor played the cop who springs Murphy from prison to help him catch a killer?
Despite technological advances, this common desk item had to be used when a cassette tape messed up.
What hit song from 1976 was sung by Elton John and Kiki Dee?
In 1986, what golfer, considered the greatest of all time, captured his sixth Masters' title?
Finish the catchphrase from S.E. Hinton's The Outsiders: "Stay gold, _________."
